source_pr.title: parser: merge back with history
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28454 

Problem Summary: Merge parser back with all history. Successor of #28455, which is closed by accident. All commits before https://github.com/pingcap/parser/commit/687005894c4edbc38a1bbf4e02c0c63127dfd209

Refer https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/pull/11979/files for `tide/merge-method-rebase` label, which will rebase all commits instead of squashing into one.

Repo generation scripts:

```
a.py:

msg = commit.message.decode("utf-8")
if msg.startswith("parser/"):
  msg = msg[7:]
msg = msg.lstrip()
msg = "[parser] " + msg
commit.message = msg.encode("utf-8")
```

```
git filter-repo --commit-callback "`cat ../a.py`" --to-subdirectory-filter  parser
```

Then git rebase pingcap/tidb#master will results in such a history.

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: +GO111MODULE=on go test -p 1 -race -covermode=atomic -coverprofile=coverage.txt -coverpkg=./...
